caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a shark logo, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a studio with dark grey, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels on the walls behind him. A microphone arm extends from the right, holding a microphone branded with "Blue" on the arm and " condenser microphone" on the body. He has a visible tattoo on his right forearm. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone. In the final moments, he raises his right arm and extends his hand forward in a gesturing motion toward the camera.
